redshift.label: Redshift focus
redshift.plan_line: Redshift for warehouse metrics — schema discovery and read-only SQL over clusters and serverless.
redshift.base_notes: Discover databases, schemas, tables, and columns and run read-only SQL over Redshift clusters and serverless workgroups via the official AWS Labs Redshift MCP server (Data API). Read-only is engine-enforced: every query runs inside a BEGIN READ ONLY transaction and the server exposes no write tools. Discover objects live before querying; SELECT-only. Pair with a read-only IAM role + DB user (see SETUP.md) so a future read-write mode can't flip on.
